title: lycium carolinianum f. hassei
intro: Lycium carolinianum f. hassei, also known as the 'Japanese wolfberry', is a variety of the Lycium carolinianum shrub, native to Japan and China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-diabetic properties, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Lycium carolinianum f. hassei include reducing blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against cell damage caused by free radicals. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
